content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.claude_teams.agent_sdk_bridge
FILE: cosmos/integration/claude_teams/agent_sdk_bridge.py (490 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: AGENT SDK BRIDGE - Programmatic Control of Claude Agents
=========================================================

Interfaces with Claude Agent SDK to spawn and control Claude agents.
Supports both Python SDK and CLI-based approaches.

Key Capabilities:
- Spawn Claude agents with custom system prom

CLASSES:
- ClaudeModel(Enum): Available Claude models for Agent SDK.
- AgentStatus(Enum): Agent lifecycle status.
- AgentSession: Represents an active Claude agent session.
- AgentResponse: Response from a Claude agent.
- AgentSDKBridge: Bridge to Claude Agent SDK for programmatic agent control.

Supports multiple op
  Methods: async def create_session(self, system_prompt: Optional[str]=None, model: Optional[ClaudeModel]=None,
  Methods: def is_available(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def send_message(self, session_id: str, message: str, timeout: float=120.0) -> AgentResponse
  Methods: async def close_session(self, session_id: str) -> None
  Methods: async def spawn_subagent(self, task: str, model: ClaudeModel=ClaudeModel.HAIKU, system_prompt: Optio
  Methods: async def spawn_team(self, team_name: str, team_size: int=3, task: str='', model: ClaudeModel=Claude
  Methods: def get_session(self, session_id: str) -> Optional[AgentSession]
  Methods: def list_sessions(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_sdk_bridge() -> AgentSDKBridge
